response.justification: Bogdan has extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL-like SQL databases, along with strong architectural and DevOps exposure, but his title of 'Senior' and 10+ years of experience far exceed the junior/mid-level scope, and his German language limitation and high on-site requirement may pose integration challenges in Berlin.
strengths: Deep TypeScript and React experience across multiple production systems
Proven fullstack ownership from API to UI with clean architecture focus
Strong DevOps and infrastructure skills (Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD)
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid role with 10+ years of senior experience
Only basic German proficiency despite high on-site requirement in Berlin
Heavy focus on DLang and niche tools may indicate misalignment with stack priorities
